text: The repetition of 'Om Namah Shivaya' drifts in my mind as I walk these modern halls filled with glass, neon, and the curated symbols of research and design. I feel detached yet contemplative; a mantra echoing within sterile, utilitarian walls. The reverent syllables juxtapose the technological displays, and I sense the strange intersection of outer innovation and inner silence—a reminder that the sacred exists quietly beneath even the most constructed environments.
